headline: Stop gaining weight—TODAY is your turnaround point
summary: You're +0.88 kg/week behind target; TODAY you must create a deficit through food discipline and real exercise.
details: Eat only Huel-portioned meals today—no snacking, no vegan substitutes that mask portions. Do 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill to create a 1500 kJ deficit and prove you can execute. TODAY sets momentum before Friday; one day of discipline stops the weekend spiral that's already cost you 0.5 kg this week.
